name: Chinese King Crab w/ Mushrooms and Snow Peas
recipeIngredient: 1 tablespoon Cornstarch, dissolved in 1/2 cup Cold water
recipeInstructions:
1. Steam snow pea pods for 5 minutes. Place in the bottom of a serving dish and keep warm.
2. In a large skillet, heat oil until very hot but not smoking. Add garlic and sauté until golden. Remove from heat.
3. Add crab meat to the skillet and toss, cooking for 1 minute. Stir in mushrooms and cook for an additional 1 minute.
4. Add poultry stock and pepper to the skillet. Bring to a boil, then add the cornstarch mixture. Cook until the sauce thickens.
5. Pour the sauce over the steamed snow pea pods. Sprinkle with ginger and toss to mix.
6. Sprinkle with scallions and serve hot with cooked brown rice.
